transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health navigation line, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medicine. It's lisinopril, 10 milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Carol. I see your lisinopril prescription with Dr. Patel, last filled about a month ago at Green Oak Pharmacy. Is that still the right pharmacy?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, that's the one on Fifth Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. I'll send a refill request to Green Oak Pharmacy for the same dosage. You have two refills remaining, so this should go through without needing new approval.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, I was worried I'd have to wait for the doctor.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No wait needed this time. It should be ready for pickup within a couple hours. Anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Carol. Take care and have a great day.
